---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
library(knitr)
# 1. knitr渲染根目录
opts_knit$set(root.dir = "D:/meta分析/9.1network meta/2026.6.25")
# 2. 强制切换真实工作目录（解决交互式getwd错乱）
wd <- "D:/meta分析/9.1network meta/2026.6.25"
if(dir.exists(wd)) setwd(wd)
# 验证
getwd()
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(meta)
library(dmetar)
# Excel 文件路径（需替换为你的实际文件路径）
excel_file <- "D:/meta分析/9.1network meta/2026.6.23/整合版数据6.23_TTD_新增n_event.xlsx"  

# 获取 Excel 中所有 sheet 的名称
sheet_names <- excel_sheets(excel_file)  

library(readxl)
library(meta)

# ---------- 关键新增：创建空列表用于存储每个sheet的mg ----------
mg_list <- list()  # 命名列表，键=sheet名，值=对应的mg对象

# ---------- 0) 结果输出目录：若不存在就创建 ----------
dir.create("forest_plots", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("forest_plots/subgroup", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("funnel_plots", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("sensitivity_forest_plots", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("leave_one_out_plots", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---------- 1) 主循环 ----------
for (sheet in sheet_names) {
  
  cat("==== Processing sheet:", sheet, "====\n")
  
  # ---- 1.1 读数据（用 tryCatch 防止单个 sheet 报错终止整个循环）----
  dat <- tryCatch(
    read_excel(excel_file, sheet = sheet),
    error = function(e) {
      cat("❌ 读取失败：", sheet, " -> ", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
  if (is.null(dat)) next
  
  # ---- 1.2 基础列检查（缺关键列就跳过）----
  required_cols <- c("HR", "LCI", "UCI", "control_type", "treatment_type1", "Trial.name","treatment_type")
  miss_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(dat))
  if (length(miss_cols) > 0) {
    cat("⚠️ 跳过：", sheet, "缺少列：", paste(miss_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    next
  }
  
  # ---- 1.3 数值化（HR/LCI/UCI）----
  dat$HR  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$HR))
  dat$LCI <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$LCI))
  dat$UCI <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$UCI))
  
  # ---- 1.4 研究筛选：对照=CT 且 treatment_type1 不缺失 ----
  sub <- subset(dat, control_type == "CT" & !is.na(treatment_type1))
  
  # ---- 1.5 若 HR 缺失但有 logHR & SE(logHR)，则反推 HR/CI ----
  # 注意：列名里带括号必须用反引号 `SE(logHR)`
  has_log_cols <- all(c("logHR", "SE(logHR)") %in% colnames(sub))
  if (has_log_cols) {
    idx_need <- is.na(sub$HR) & !is.na(sub$logHR) & !is.na(sub$`SE(logHR)`)
    if (any(idx_need)) {
      sub$HR[idx_need]  <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need])
      sub$LCI[idx_need] <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need] - 1.96 * sub$`SE(logHR)`[idx_need])
      sub$UCI[idx_need] <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need] + 1.96 * sub$`SE(logHR)`[idx_need])
    }
  }
  
  # ---- 1.6 过滤有效行：HR/LCI/UCI 必须齐全且 >0 ----
  sub <- sub[complete.cases(sub$HR, sub$LCI, sub$UCI), ]
  sub <- sub[sub$HR > 0 & sub$LCI > 0 & sub$UCI > 0, ]
  
  if (nrow(sub) == 0) {
    cat("⚠️ 警告：", sheet, "过滤后无有效数据\n")
    next
  }
  
  # ---- 1.7 构造 TE 与 seTE（推荐显式给 seTE，最稳）----
  # TE = log(HR)
  # seTE ≈ (log(UCI)-log(LCI)) / (2*1.96)
  sub$TE   <- log(sub$HR)
  sub$seTE <- (log(sub$UCI) - log(sub$LCI)) / (2 * 1.96)
  
  # seTE 必须为正且非缺失
  sub <- sub[is.finite(sub$TE) & is.finite(sub$seTE) & sub$seTE > 0, ]
  if (nrow(sub) == 0) {
    cat("⚠️ 警告：", sheet, "无法计算有效 seTE（可能CI不合理）\n")
    next
  }
  
  # ---- 1.8 Meta 分析 ----
  mg <- tryCatch(
    meta::metagen(
      TE = TE,
      seTE = seTE,
      studlab = `Trial.name`,
      sm = "HR",
      n.e = N_E,
      n.c  = N_C,
      method.tau = "DL",
      hakn = T,
      fixed = FALSE,
      prediction = F,
      data = sub
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      cat("❌ metagen 失败：", sheet, " -> ", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
  if (is.null(mg)) next
  
  # ---------- 关键新增：将当前sheet的mg存入列表 ----------
  mg_list[[sheet]] <- mg  # 按sheet名称命名列表元素，避免覆盖
  
  # =========================
  # 2) Forest plot
  # =========================
  plot_filename <- paste0("forest_plots/forest_plot_", gsub(" ", "_", sheet), ".pdf")
  pdf(plot_filename, width = 12, height = 8)
  p_val <- round(mg$pval.random, 4)
  p_val_formatted <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "<0.001", paste("=", round(p_val, 4)))
  meta::forest(
    mg,
    xlab = "Hazard Ratio (HR)",
    leftcols = c("studlab", "n.e", "n.c"),
    leftlabs = c("Study", "Experimental\n(N)", "Control\n(N)"),
    print.tau2 = TRUE,
    # layout = "JAMA",
    main = paste("Forest Plot for Outcome:", sheet),
    test.overall = TRUE,
    label.right = "Higher risk\nof deterioration",
    label.left  = "Lower risk\nof deterioration",
    # 核心：自定义汇总行标签，加入p值
    summarylab = paste("Overall (p", p_val, ")", sep = ""),
    # 可选：调整汇总行字体加粗
    fontsize.summary = 12,
    fontface.summary = "bold"
  )
  dev.off()
  
  # =========================
  # 3) Funnel plot + Egger（稳健版，不会再报 text length 0）
  # =========================
  funnel_filename <- paste0("funnel_plots/funnel_plot_", gsub(" ", "_", sheet), ".pdf")
  pdf(funnel_filename, width = 12, height = 8)
  
  meta::funnel(mg, main = paste("Funnel Plot for Outcome:", sheet))
  
  k <- mg$k
  egger_text <- NULL
  
  if (!is.null(k) && is.finite(k) && k >= 10) {
    eg <- tryCatch(
      meta::metabias(mg, method.bias = "linreg"),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    
    pval <- NA_real_
    if (!is.null(eg)) {
      if (!is.null(eg$p.value) && length(eg$p.value) == 1) pval <- eg$p.value
      if (is.na(pval) && !is.null(eg$p.value.bias) && length(eg$p.value.bias) == 1) pval <- eg$p.value.bias
      if (is.na(pval) && !is.null(eg$bias$p.value) && length(eg$bias$p.value) == 1) pval <- eg$bias$p.value
    }
    
    if (is.finite(pval)) {
      egger_text <- sprintf("Egger regression test (linreg): p = %.3g (k = %d)", pval, k)
    } else {
      egger_text <- sprintf("Egger regression test (linreg): p not available (k = %d)", k)
    }
  } else {
    egger_text <- sprintf(
      "Egger regression test not performed (k = %s; recommended only when k \u2265 10)",
      ifelse(is.null(k), "NA", as.character(k))
    )
  }
  
  mtext(egger_text, side = 3, line = 0.5, adj = 1, cex = 0.9)
  dev.off()
  
  # =========================
  # 4) Leave-one-out / influence（稳健：不让缺包中断）
  # =========================
  
  # 4.1 metainf（meta 包自带）
  sensitivity_filename <- paste0("sensitivity_forest_plots/sensitivity_forest_plot_", gsub(" ", "_", sheet), ".pdf")
  pdf(sensitivity_filename, width = 12, height = 8)
  
  mi <- tryCatch(meta::metainf(mg, pooled = "random"), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(mi)) {
    meta::forest(
      mi,
      comb.fixed = FALSE,
      main = paste("Leave-one-out sensitivity (metainf):", sheet),
      layout = "JAMA",
      cex = 0.6
    )
  } else {
    plot.new()
    text(0.5, 0.5, "metainf failed / not available for this outcome", cex = 1)
  }
  dev.off()
  
  # 4.2 InfluenceAnalysis（常见来自 dmetar；可能你环境里没有）
  # 如果没有该函数，就跳过，不报错
  if (exists("InfluenceAnalysis")) {
    m.gen.inf <- tryCatch(InfluenceAnalysis(mg, random = TRUE), error = function(e) NULL)
    
    leave_one_out_filename <- paste0("leave_one_out_plots/leave_one_out_plot_", gsub(" ", "_", sheet), ".pdf")
    pdf(leave_one_out_filename, width = 12, height = 8)
    
    if (!is.null(m.gen.inf)) {
      par(mar = c(4, 4, 2, 2))
      plot(m.gen.inf, "i2")
    } else {
      plot.new()
      text(0.5, 0.5, "InfluenceAnalysis failed for this outcome", cex = 1)
    }
    dev.off()
  } else {
    cat("ℹ️ InfluenceAnalysis() 未找到（可能未安装/未加载 dmetar），跳过 leave_one_out i2 图：", sheet, "\n")
  }
  
  # =========================
  # 5) 亚组分析：byvar = treatment_type（若 treatment_type 列存在才做）
  # =========================
  if ("treatment_type" %in% colnames(sub)) {
    
    mg_sub <- tryCatch(
      meta::metagen(
        TE = TE,
        seTE = seTE,
        studlab = `Trial.name`,
        sm = "HR",
        n.e = N_E,
        n.c  = N_C,
        method.tau = "DL",
        hakn = T,
        fixed = FALSE,
        byvar = treatment_type,
        data = sub
      ),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    
    if (!is.null(mg_sub)) {
      plot_filename2 <- paste0("forest_plots/subgroup/forest_", gsub(" ", "_", sheet), "_treatment_type.pdf")
      pdf(plot_filename2, width = 12, height = 8)
      
      meta::forest(
        mg_sub,
        xlab = "Hazard Ratio (HR)",
        leftcols = c("studlab", "n.e", "n.c"),
        leftlabs = c("Study", "Experimental\n(N)", "Control\n(N)"),
        print.tau2 = TRUE,
        #layout = "JAMA",
        print.byvar = TRUE,
        overall = TRUE,
        main = paste(sheet, "- Subgroup analysis: treatment_type"),
        label.right = "Higher risk\nof deterioration",
        label.left  = "Lower risk\nof deterioration"
      )
      dev.off()
    } else {
      cat("⚠️ 亚组分析失败（treatment_type）：", sheet, "\n")
    }
    
  } else {
    cat("p：", p_val, "\n")
  }
  
  cat("p", p_val_formatted,":", sheet, "\n\n")
}

# ---------- 关键新增：保存mg_list到文件（可选但推荐） ----------
# 方式1：保存为RData（可存多个对象，加载后直接调用mg_list）
save(mg_list, file = "meta_analysis_mg_objects.RData")

# 方式2：保存为RDS（单个对象，更轻量）
saveRDS(mg_list, file = "meta_analysis_mg_objects.rds")

cat("✅ 所有有效sheet的mg已存入mg_list列表，并保存为RData/RDS文件！\n")
```

```{r the association os and qol old, eval=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
fa<-mg_list$EF$data
OS<-read_excel("D:/meta分析/9.1network meta/2026.6.23/整合版数据6.23_TTD_新增n_event.xlsx",sheet = "QOL")
OS<-OS%>%
  select("Study.ID","HR.OS" , "LCI.OS" ,"UCI.OS")
qol<-merge(fa,OS,by="Study.ID")
# 1) Pearson相关（对应文中“correlation between HRs of PFS and OS”）
cor_test <- cor.test(qol$HR, qol$HR.OS, method = "pearson")
cor_test
# 2) 线性回归（文中说“whenever correlation was significant, we conducted linear regression”）
fit <- lm(HR.OS ~ HR, data = qol)
summary(fit)   # R^2 和 p 值就在这里
library(ggplot2)
# 3) 作图（类似 eFigure 4）
p<-ggplot(qol, aes(x = HR, y = HR.OS)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "TTD of EF Hazard Ratio", y = "OS Hazard Ratio")

# 保存图形（最常用的PNG格式，可根据需求调整参数）
ggsave(
  filename = "HR_EF_OS_scatter.pdf",  # 保存的文件名（含格式）
  plot = p,                            # 要保存的图形对象
  width = 6,                           # 宽度（单位：英寸）
  height = 5,                          # 高度（单位：英寸）
  dpi = 300,                           # 分辨率（300dpi适合论文/期刊）
  bg = "white"                         # 背景色（避免透明背景）
)

# 1) 反推SE(logHR)
dat2 <- qol %>%
  mutate(
    logHR_PFS = log(HR),
    se_PFS    = (log(UCI) - log(LCI)) / (2*1.96),
    logHR_OS  = log(HR.OS),
    se_OS     = (log(UCI.OS) - log(LCI.OS)) / (2*1.96)
  )

# 2) 计算log(rHR)与SE
dat2 <- dat2 %>%
  mutate(
    log_rHR = logHR_PFS - logHR_OS,
    se_rHR  = sqrt(se_PFS^2 + se_OS^2),
    rHR     = exp(log_rHR),
    rHR_LCI = exp(log_rHR - 1.96*se_rHR),
    rHR_UCI = exp(log_rHR + 1.96*se_rHR)
  )

dat2 %>% select(Study.ID, rHR, rHR_LCI, rHR_UCI)

# 3) 随机效应合并（Gyawali写的是random-effects）
library(metafor)
m_rhr <- rma(yi = log_rHR, sei = se_rHR, method = "DL", data = dat2)  # DL仅作示例
m_rhr

# 4) 输出合并rHR
pooled_rHR <- exp(c(m_rhr$b, m_rhr$ci.lb, m_rhr$ci.ub))
names(pooled_rHR) <- c("pooled_rHR","LCI","UCI")
pooled_rHR

mg1<-metagen(
        TE = log_rHR,
        seTE = se_rHR,
        studlab = `Trial.name`,
        sm = "HR",
        n.e = N_E,
        n.c  = N_C,
        method.tau = "DL",
        hakn = T,
        fixed = FALSE,
        data = dat2
      )
# 5) 森林图（类似文中 Figure）
forest(mg1, slab = dat2$Trial.name, atransf = exp,
       xlab = "rHR = HR(QoL) / HR(OS)")

m.gen.inf <- InfluenceAnalysis(mg1, random =TRUE)
summary(m.gen.inf)
plot(m.gen.inf,"baujat")
plot(m.gen.inf,"influence")
update(mg1, exclude = c(4,5)) %>% summary()
summary(mg)

```

```{r association os and each qol sheet}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(metafor)
library(meta)
library(readxl)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Association between each QoL/PRO TTD outcome sheet and OS
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# OS HR/CI are stored in the QOL sheet and are matched by Study.ID.
OS <- read_excel(excel_file, sheet = "QOL") %>%
  select(Study.ID, HR.OS, LCI.OS, UCI.OS) %>%
  mutate(
    HR.OS  = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(HR.OS)),
    LCI.OS = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(LCI.OS)),
    UCI.OS = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(UCI.OS))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Study.ID),
    is.finite(HR.OS), is.finite(LCI.OS), is.finite(UCI.OS),
    HR.OS > 0, LCI.OS > 0, UCI.OS > 0
  ) %>%
  distinct(Study.ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

dir.create("association_os_qol", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("association_os_qol/scatter", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("association_os_qol/rHR_forest", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("association_os_qol/influence", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

safe_filename <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_\\-]+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("_+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("^_|_$", "", x)
  ifelse(nchar(x) == 0, "sheet", x)
}

association_results <- list()
rhr_results <- list()
association_detail <- list()

for (outcome_name in names(mg_list)) {
  cat("==== OS association:", outcome_name, "====\n")
  
  fa <- mg_list[[outcome_name]]$data
  if (is.null(fa) || nrow(fa) == 0) {
    cat("Skip:", outcome_name, "has no mg$data\n")
    next
  }
  
  needed_cols <- c("Study.ID", "HR", "LCI", "UCI", "Trial.name")
  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed_cols, colnames(fa))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    cat("Skip:", outcome_name, "missing columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    next
  }
  
  qol <- fa %>%
    mutate(
      HR  = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(HR)),
      LCI = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(LCI)),
      UCI = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(UCI))
    ) %>%
    inner_join(OS, by = "Study.ID") %>%
    filter(
      is.finite(HR), is.finite(LCI), is.finite(UCI),
      is.finite(HR.OS), is.finite(LCI.OS), is.finite(UCI.OS),
      HR > 0, LCI > 0, UCI > 0,
      HR.OS > 0, LCI.OS > 0, UCI.OS > 0
    )
  
  association_detail[[outcome_name]] <- qol %>%
    mutate(outcome = outcome_name) %>%
    select(outcome, Study.ID, Trial.name, HR, LCI, UCI, HR.OS, LCI.OS, UCI.OS, everything())
  
  if (nrow(qol) < 3) {
    association_results[[outcome_name]] <- data.frame(
      outcome = outcome_name,
      n_studies = nrow(qol),
      pearson_r = NA_real_,
      pearson_p = NA_real_,
      lm_beta = NA_real_,
      lm_p = NA_real_,
      lm_r2 = NA_real_,
      note = "Skipped: fewer than 3 matched studies"
    )
    cat("Skip correlation/regression:", outcome_name, "has fewer than 3 matched studies\n")
    next
  }
  
  cor_test <- tryCatch(
    cor.test(qol$HR, qol$HR.OS, method = "pearson"),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  fit <- tryCatch(lm(HR.OS ~ HR, data = qol), error = function(e) NULL)
  fit_sum <- if (!is.null(fit)) summary(fit) else NULL
  
  association_results[[outcome_name]] <- data.frame(
    outcome = outcome_name,
    n_studies = nrow(qol),
    pearson_r = if (!is.null(cor_test)) unname(cor_test$estimate) else NA_real_,
    pearson_p = if (!is.null(cor_test)) cor_test$p.value else NA_real_,
    lm_beta = if (!is.null(fit)) unname(coef(fit)["HR"]) else NA_real_,
    lm_p = if (!is.null(fit_sum)) coef(fit_sum)["HR", "Pr(>|t|)"] else NA_real_,
    lm_r2 = if (!is.null(fit_sum)) fit_sum$r.squared else NA_real_,
    note = NA_character_
  )
  
  p <- ggplot(qol, aes(x = HR, y = HR.OS)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.5) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
    labs(
      x = paste0("TTD of ", outcome_name, " Hazard Ratio"),
      y = "OS Hazard Ratio",
      title = paste0("Association between TTD of ", outcome_name, " and OS")
    ) +
    theme_bw()
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path("association_os_qol/scatter", paste0("HR_", safe_filename(outcome_name), "_OS_scatter.pdf")),
    plot = p,
    width = 6,
    height = 5,
    dpi = 300,
    bg = "white"
  )
  
  dat2 <- qol %>%
    mutate(
      logHR_QoL = log(HR),
      se_QoL    = (log(UCI) - log(LCI)) / (2 * 1.96),
      logHR_OS  = log(HR.OS),
      se_OS     = (log(UCI.OS) - log(LCI.OS)) / (2 * 1.96),
      log_rHR   = logHR_QoL - logHR_OS,
      se_rHR    = sqrt(se_QoL^2 + se_OS^2),
      rHR       = exp(log_rHR),
      rHR_LCI   = exp(log_rHR - 1.96 * se_rHR),
      rHR_UCI   = exp(log_rHR + 1.96 * se_rHR)
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(log_rHR), is.finite(se_rHR), se_rHR > 0)
  
  if (nrow(dat2) < 2) {
    rhr_results[[outcome_name]] <- data.frame(
      outcome = outcome_name,
      n_studies = nrow(dat2),
      pooled_rHR = NA_real_,
      LCI = NA_real_,
      UCI = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      I2 = NA_real_,
      note = "Skipped: fewer than 2 studies for rHR pooling"
    )
    cat("Skip rHR pooling:", outcome_name, "has fewer than 2 valid studies\n")
    next
  }
  
  m_rhr <- tryCatch(
    metafor::rma(yi = log_rHR, sei = se_rHR, method = "DL", data = dat2),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  if (!is.null(m_rhr)) {
    rhr_results[[outcome_name]] <- data.frame(
      outcome = outcome_name,
      n_studies = nrow(dat2),
      pooled_rHR = exp(as.numeric(m_rhr$b)),
      LCI = exp(m_rhr$ci.lb),
      UCI = exp(m_rhr$ci.ub),
      p_value = m_rhr$pval,
      I2 = m_rhr$I2,
      note = NA_character_
    )
  }
  
  mg_rhr <- tryCatch(
    meta::metagen(
      TE = log_rHR,
      seTE = se_rHR,
      studlab = Trial.name,
      sm = "HR",
      method.tau = "DL",
      hakn = TRUE,
      fixed = FALSE,
      random = TRUE,
      data = dat2
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  if (!is.null(mg_rhr)) {
    pdf(file.path("association_os_qol/rHR_forest", paste0("rHR_", safe_filename(outcome_name), "_forest.pdf")),
        width = 9, height = 7)
    meta::forest(
      mg_rhr,
      xlab = paste0("rHR = HR(", outcome_name, " TTD) / HR(OS)"),
      backtransf = TRUE,
      comb.fixed = FALSE,
      comb.random = TRUE,
      layout = "JAMA"
    )
    dev.off()
    
    if (exists("InfluenceAnalysis")) {
      inf <- tryCatch(InfluenceAnalysis(mg_rhr, random = TRUE), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(inf)) {
        pdf(file.path("association_os_qol/influence", paste0("rHR_", safe_filename(outcome_name), "_influence.pdf")),
            width = 9, height = 7)
        plot(inf, "influence")
        dev.off()
      }
    }
  }
}

association_summary <- bind_rows(association_results)
rhr_summary <- bind_rows(rhr_results)
association_detail_df <- bind_rows(association_detail)

write.csv(association_summary, "association_os_qol/association_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(rhr_summary, "association_os_qol/rHR_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(association_detail_df, "association_os_qol/association_detail_matched_studies.csv", row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(
  list(
    association_summary = association_summary,
    rhr_summary = rhr_summary,
    association_detail = association_detail
  ),
  "association_os_qol/association_os_qol_results.rds"
)

association_summary
rhr_summary
```

#做剔除影响异质性的研究后的森林图，pain中的研究是EMPOWER-Lung 3 part 2
```{r}
library(readxl)
library(meta)

# 1. 文件路径与文件夹创建
excel_file <- "D:/meta分析/9.1network meta/2026.6.23/整合版数据6.23_TTD_新增n_event.xlsx"
dir.create("forest_plots/excl_outlier", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# 2. 单独读取Pain工作表并清洗（和你循环筛选逻辑完全统一）
dat <- read_excel(excel_file, sheet = "Pain")#做剔除影响异质性的研究后的森林图，pain中的研究是EMPOWER-Lung 3 part 2
required_cols <- c("HR", "LCI", "UCI", "control_type", "treatment_type1", "Trial.name","treatment_type", "N_E", "N_C")
dat$HR  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$HR))
dat$LCI <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$LCI))
dat$UCI <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$UCI))
sub <- subset(dat, control_type == "CT" & !is.na(treatment_type1))

# 反推缺失HR
has_log_cols <- all(c("logHR", "SE(logHR)") %in% colnames(sub))
if (has_log_cols) {
  idx_need <- is.na(sub$HR) & !is.na(sub$logHR) & !is.na(sub$`SE(logHR)`)
  if (any(idx_need)) {
    sub$HR[idx_need]  <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need])
    sub$LCI[idx_need] <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need] - 1.96 * sub$`SE(logHR)`[idx_need])
    sub$UCI[idx_need] <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need] + 1.96 * sub$`SE(logHR)`[idx_need])
  }
}

# 过滤有效数据
sub <- sub[complete.cases(sub$HR, sub$LCI, sub$UCI), ]
sub <- sub[sub$HR > 0 & sub$LCI > 0 & sub$UCI > 0, ]
sub$TE   <- log(sub$HR)
sub$seTE <- (log(sub$UCI) - log(sub$LCI)) / (2 * 1.96)
sub <- sub[is.finite(sub$TE) & is.finite(sub$seTE) & sub$seTE > 0, ]

# 3. 剔除异质性来源研究 EMPOWER-Lung 3 part 2
sub_excl <- subset(sub, Trial.name != "EMPOWER-Lung 3 part 2")
if (nrow(sub_excl) < 2) stop("剔除后研究不足2项，无法绘图")

# 4. 构建HK随机效应meta模型（和原图模型一致 hakn=T）
mg_excl <- metagen(
  TE = TE,
  seTE = seTE,
  studlab = `Trial.name`,
  sm = "HR",
  n.e = N_E,
  n.c  = N_C,
  method.tau = "DL",
  hakn = TRUE,    # Hartung-Knapp校正，对应图中(HK)
  fixed = FALSE,
  prediction = FALSE,
  data = sub_excl
)

# 5. 【核心绘图代码】
excl_plot_name <- "forest_plots/excl_outlier/forest_Pain_matched_style.pdf"
# 使用cairo_pdf规避字体报错
cairo_pdf(excl_plot_name, width = 14, height = 8, family = "Arial")
forest(mg_excl)
dev.off()
cat("✅ 复刻样式森林图已保存：", excl_plot_name, "\n")
summary(mg_excl)
```

#做剔除影响异质性的研究后的森林图，食欲不佳中的研究是MYSTIC(D)和EMPOWER-Lung 1
```{r}
library(readxl)
library(meta)

# 1. 文件路径与文件夹创建
excel_file <- "D:/meta分析/9.1network meta/2026.6.23/整合版数据6.23_TTD_新增n_event.xlsx"
dir.create("forest_plots/excl_outlier", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# 2. 单独读取Pain工作表并清洗（和你循环筛选逻辑完全统一）
dat <- read_excel(excel_file, sheet = "Appetite Loss")#做剔除影响异质性的研究后的森林图，pain中的研究是EMPOWER-Lung 3 part 2
required_cols <- c("HR", "LCI", "UCI", "control_type", "treatment_type1", "Trial.name","treatment_type", "N_E", "N_C")
dat$HR  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$HR))
dat$LCI <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$LCI))
dat$UCI <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$UCI))
sub <- subset(dat, control_type == "CT" & !is.na(treatment_type1))

# 反推缺失HR
has_log_cols <- all(c("logHR", "SE(logHR)") %in% colnames(sub))
if (has_log_cols) {
  idx_need <- is.na(sub$HR) & !is.na(sub$logHR) & !is.na(sub$`SE(logHR)`)
  if (any(idx_need)) {
    sub$HR[idx_need]  <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need])
    sub$LCI[idx_need] <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need] - 1.96 * sub$`SE(logHR)`[idx_need])
    sub$UCI[idx_need] <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need] + 1.96 * sub$`SE(logHR)`[idx_need])
  }
}

# 过滤有效数据
sub <- sub[complete.cases(sub$HR, sub$LCI, sub$UCI), ]
sub <- sub[sub$HR > 0 & sub$LCI > 0 & sub$UCI > 0, ]
sub$TE   <- log(sub$HR)
sub$seTE <- (log(sub$UCI) - log(sub$LCI)) / (2 * 1.96)
sub <- sub[is.finite(sub$TE) & is.finite(sub$seTE) & sub$seTE > 0, ]

# 3. 剔除异质性来源研究 MYSTIC(D),EMPOWER-Lung 1
sub_excl <- subset(sub, Trial.name != "EMPOWER-Lung 1" & Trial.name != "MYSTIC(D)")
if (nrow(sub_excl) < 2) stop("剔除后研究不足2项，无法绘图")

# 4. 构建HK随机效应meta模型（和原图模型一致 hakn=T）
mg_excl <- metagen(
  TE = TE,
  seTE = seTE,
  studlab = `Trial.name`,
  sm = "HR",
  n.e = N_E,
  n.c  = N_C,
  method.tau = "DL",
  hakn = TRUE,    # Hartung-Knapp校正，对应图中(HK)
  fixed = FALSE,
  prediction = FALSE,
  data = sub_excl
)

# 5. 【核心绘图代码】
excl_plot_name <- "forest_plots/excl_outlier/forest_Appetite_Loss_matched_style.pdf"
# 使用cairo_pdf规避字体报错
cairo_pdf(excl_plot_name, width = 14, height = 8, family = "Arial")
forest(mg_excl)
dev.off()
cat("✅ 复刻样式森林图已保存：", excl_plot_name, "\n")
summary(mg_excl)
```

#做剔除影响异质性的研究后的森林图，恶心呕吐中的研究是EMPOWER-Lung 1
```{r}
library(readxl)
library(meta)

# 1. 文件路径与文件夹创建
excel_file <- "D:/meta分析/9.1network meta/2026.6.23/整合版数据6.23_TTD_新增n_event.xlsx"
dir.create("forest_plots/excl_outlier", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# 2. 单独读取Pain工作表并清洗（和你循环筛选逻辑完全统一）
dat <- read_excel(excel_file, sheet = "NV")#做剔除影响异质性的研究后的森林图，pain中的研究是EMPOWER-Lung 3 part 2
required_cols <- c("HR", "LCI", "UCI", "control_type", "treatment_type1", "Trial.name","treatment_type", "N_E", "N_C")
dat$HR  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$HR))
dat$LCI <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$LCI))
dat$UCI <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$UCI))
sub <- subset(dat, control_type == "CT" & !is.na(treatment_type1))

# 反推缺失HR
has_log_cols <- all(c("logHR", "SE(logHR)") %in% colnames(sub))
if (has_log_cols) {
  idx_need <- is.na(sub$HR) & !is.na(sub$logHR) & !is.na(sub$`SE(logHR)`)
  if (any(idx_need)) {
    sub$HR[idx_need]  <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need])
    sub$LCI[idx_need] <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need] - 1.96 * sub$`SE(logHR)`[idx_need])
    sub$UCI[idx_need] <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need] + 1.96 * sub$`SE(logHR)`[idx_need])
  }
}

# 过滤有效数据
sub <- sub[complete.cases(sub$HR, sub$LCI, sub$UCI), ]
sub <- sub[sub$HR > 0 & sub$LCI > 0 & sub$UCI > 0, ]
sub$TE   <- log(sub$HR)
sub$seTE <- (log(sub$UCI) - log(sub$LCI)) / (2 * 1.96)
sub <- sub[is.finite(sub$TE) & is.finite(sub$seTE) & sub$seTE > 0, ]

# 3. 剔除异质性来源研究 MYSTIC(D),EMPOWER-Lung 1
sub_excl <- subset(sub, Trial.name != "EMPOWER-Lung 1")
if (nrow(sub_excl) < 2) stop("剔除后研究不足2项，无法绘图")

# 4. 构建HK随机效应meta模型（和原图模型一致 hakn=T）
mg_excl <- metagen(
  TE = TE,
  seTE = seTE,
  studlab = `Trial.name`,
  sm = "HR",
  n.e = N_E,
  n.c  = N_C,
  method.tau = "DL",
  hakn = TRUE,    # Hartung-Knapp校正，对应图中(HK)
  fixed = FALSE,
  prediction = FALSE,
  data = sub_excl
)

# 5. 【核心绘图代码】
excl_plot_name <- "forest_plots/excl_outlier/forest_NV_matched_style.pdf"
# 使用cairo_pdf规避字体报错
cairo_pdf(excl_plot_name, width = 14, height = 8, family = "Arial")
forest(mg_excl)
dev.off()
cat("✅ 复刻样式森林图已保存：", excl_plot_name, "\n")
summary(mg_excl)
```
